title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1312 - Nonapplicability of certain provisions of insurance holding companies law
text:
376.1312.  Nonapplicability of certain provisions of insurance holding companies law. — Sections 382.040, 382.060, and 382.095 shall not apply to a reorganization or merger pursuant to the provisions of sections 376.1300 to 376.1322.
(L. 1996 S.B. 759)
